Metadata.description: Software Developer specializing in React and Next. Expert in creating modern and optimized interfaces, with backend knowledge for complete solutions.

Hero.tagline: I build web and mobile products, from idea to production.

Projects.title: From idea to reality
Projects.subtitle: These are some of my featured projects

items.name: labarra.py
items.title: La Barra
items.description: La Barra is a mobile app for buying drinks that allows you to explore a catalog of beers, sodas, juices and more, with quick access to promotions and home delivery orders in a simple and direct way.

0.description: I am responsible for facilitating development for other teams through the creation of internal libraries, maintaining quality standards, implementing best practices, and producing technical documentation with React and Vite, using Scrum as an agile methodology.

1.description: Development of a beverage e-commerce mobile application with React Native and TypeScript following the agile Scrum methodology.

2.description: Development of an enterprise web platform that automates invoicing, manages work teams, and provides metrics, built with Next.js. Development of a real-time customer support mobile app using React Native and Socket.IO.

3.description: Custom software development for USA clients using React and React Native. Creation of reusable components following Figma designs.

4.description: Development of enterprise banking software using .NET Core and SQL.

About.title: About me
paragraphs: I'm Cayo, a FullStack developer from Paraguay who loves building digital products that feel fast, clear and well-crafted. I work end to end — from polished interfaces in React and React Native to solid APIs in Node and NestJS.

Today I lead the technical innovation of the internal systems where I work, building reusable libraries and raising the team's quality standards. Throughout my career I've helped e-commerce, fintech and custom-software companies ship their ideas to production.
